content.en:
Extreme Dao Mountain was not far from the Ancestral City of Time and Space, and Ye Tian came to the foot of Extreme Dao Mountain in an instant.

At this moment, the Extreme Dao Mountain was wrapped in a dense Extreme Dao power, forming an indestructible realm.

Ye Tian stepped into the Extreme Dao Mountain, and the terrifying Extreme Dao power shattered.

In an instant, Ye Tian used the power of the sword to protect himself, and it was okay.

"Sure enough, if you don't comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao, you will definitely be suppressed and crushed by the power of the Extreme Dao Mountain in an instant, and even the high-level perfect controllers will not be able to compete, and they will definitely be killed in an instant!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After entering the Extreme Dao Mountain, Ye Tian walked towards the mountain step by step, but soon he couldn't walk, and the power of the Extreme Dao of the Sword could not allow him to continue to move forward.

At this time, Ye Tian understood that the power of his Sword Extreme Dao was not strong enough, so he could only move in this area, don't think about continuing to go deeper.

In the following days, Ye Tian let his will clone condense the Sword Extreme Dao Coin here.

It is not difficult to condense the Sword Extreme Dao Coins, and it is enough to use the power of the Sword Extreme Dao to connect the Sword Extreme Dao power densely packed in the Extreme Dao Mountain, and continue to compress it in a certain way.

And Ye Tian also found a suitable place and began to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao Mountain.

Ye Tian had already comprehended the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and his next goal was to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Time and the Extreme Dao of Space.

As for the Endless Extreme Dao, he didn't have a clue at the moment, so naturally he couldn't go to enlightenment.

I have to say, Jidao Mountain is amazing.

The effect of contemplating the power of the Extreme Path here is much better than the effect of contemplating the power of the Extreme Path in the midst of the super-perfect treasures.

Moreover, there are no restrictions on the ability to comprehend all kinds of extreme powers.

"How did the Space-Time Ancestral Realm come about, there is such a wonderful place!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It's a pity that he can only practice here for 100 million eternal years, and if he can continue to meditate and enlighten, how good it would be!

However, even if he was only 100 million eternal years, with his innate comprehension, he could definitely easily comprehend the power of the Space Pole, the Time Pole, and other Poles.

"Let's first fuse the perfect-grade ancestral endowments that were copied before!"

Ye Tian quickly fused all these perfect-level ancestral endowments, and his talent and qualification potential increased again.

In the following years, Ye Tian first comprehended the power of the Spatial Extreme Dao.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, 100,000 eternal years had passed.

"Buzz!"

A Sword Extreme Dao Coin was born in Ye Tian's hand.

"Sword Extreme Dao Coin, the condensation has been successful!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

This Sword Extreme Dao Coin alone is very valuable.

Ye Tian's copy body is still cultivating, and the will clone is going to go to the Space-Time Ancestral City to have a look, and by the way, see what this Sword Extreme Dao Coin can buy.

After all, it's not bad to relax once in a while, although he has been to the Ancestral City of Time and Space, he hasn't seriously visited it yet.

Wow!

Ye Tian came down from Jidao Mountain and came to the Ancestral City of Time and Space.

The Ancestral City of Time and Space is very large, and there are many exchanges, and there are even trading houses that sell perfect exotic treasures, which can be exchanged for Extreme Dao Coins.

The perfect treasure that is hard to find in the outside world seems to be common here.

As long as there is enough extreme ratio, even high-level perfect treasures can be bought.

Of course, if you want to buy a high-level perfect treasure, you need a lot of Extreme Dao Coins.

Ye Tian understood the situation, basically a primary-grade perfect treasure needed several Extreme Dao Coins, and a medium Perfect Exotic Treasure needed dozens of Extreme Dao Coins.

As for the high-grade Perfection Treasure, a minimum of a thousand Extreme Dao Coins is required.

After all, a high-level perfect treasure is of great use even to a force like the Wudao Tower, so its value is very high, and it is almost impossible for an individual to afford it, unless it is a force that spends a price to buy it.

Of course, if a perfect controller who has comprehended the power of the Extreme Dao has been condensing the Extreme Dao Coins, and if he doesn't use them, he can gather a thousand Extreme Dao Coins before leaving the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, then he can exchange them for a high-level Perfect Treasure. 、

Of course, a strong person who can comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao does not necessarily care about the high-level perfect treasure.

For them, it is even more important to comprehend one more extreme power.

In addition to the Perfect Treasure, the Space-Time Ancestral City can also purchase many resources, and even Extreme Creation Materials.

That's right, the Space-Time Ancestral City can buy a lot of pole-making materials, and a single Pole Dao coin can buy a lot of pole-making materials.

"It's the first time I've thought it's so easy to get a polar substance!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

In the Space-Time Ancestral City, Ye Tian also learned that not all the cultivators who came to the Space-Time Ancestral Realm came from the Eternal Ruins, and there was more than one Eternal Heaven and Earth comparable to the Eternal Ruins at the end of the realm, so the cultivators here were very mixed.

In addition, in the Space-Time Ancestral City, there are not only two ways to obtain Extreme Dao Coins, such as condensing yourself or exchanging them for things, but also other ways.

For example, gambling fights.

If two perfect controllers gamble and fight, the bet is Pole Coins, and once you win, you can get a lot of Pole Coins.

Of course, the general bet will not be too big.

But the way to get a lot of Jidao Coins is to take on tasks.

For example, some strong people need help, so they will issue tasks in the Ancestral City of Time and Space, and if anyone helps them complete the task, they will be rewarded with the Extreme Dao Ratio.

Of course, this kind of task is chaotic, and if you are unlucky, you may run out of money, so you need to think about it at your own discretion.

Ye Tian took a look, many tasks don't have the strength of the super perfect controller, and there are even tasks that are rewarded to hunt down the super perfect master, the reward is very high, but it is almost impossible to complete.

How difficult it is to kill a super perfect controller, every super perfect controller has his own hole cards, just like the stone dragon demon lord, he is also a super perfect controller, although he is not strong among the super perfect controllers, but he has the ability to resurrect the dead, but he can't kill him.

Of course, if the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller makes a move, he can indeed kill the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, but the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller will not do this.

"Let's use this Sword Extreme Dao Coin to buy some Pole Creation Substance first!"

Ye Tian decided.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took this Sword Extreme Dao Coin and bought some Pole Creation Material, and then returned to Extreme Dao Mountain to continue his cultivation, and the Pole Creation Material was used to break the chain of Pole Creation.

Time passes, and before you know it, millions of eternal years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already condensed a lot of Sword Extreme Dao Coins, all of which were used to purchase Pole Creation Materials, and with these Extreme Creation Materials, coupled with the power of Sword Extreme Dao, he broke the chains of Pole Creation one by one.

At present, he has broken sixteen chains of pole making, and his strength has skyrocketed.

Other than that.

Practicing in the Extreme Dao Mountain, the Spatial Extreme Dao is about to be completely comprehended.
